Created attachment 240004
Patches

Re-adding graphics/mapnik since expiration in 2020, there are some patches required in order to have it successfully build. Although they are indeed available upstream, they are unable to be applied directly to the latest release version.


Also posted a pull request here: https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/pull/157
